# anthropic_workspace (Data Source)

Fetches a single Anthropic workspace by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "anthropic_workspace" "platform" {
  id = "wrkspc_01JwQvzr7rXLA5AGx3HKfFUJ"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Workspace ID.

### Read-Only

- `archived_at` (String)
- `compartment_id` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `data_residency` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--data_residency))
- `display_color` (String)
- `external_key_id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `tags` (Map of String)

<a id="nestedatt--data_residency"></a>
### Nested Schema for `data_residency`

Read-Only:

- `allowed_inference_geos` (List of String)
- `default_inference_geo` (String)
- `workspace_geo` (String)
